title: Warden Mahoraga
description: warden adds a few details just like mahoraga from jjk
body:
## Why this resource pack exists ##
You think vanilla warden doesn't look too strong? Then let's add some similarities to Mahoraga from Jujutsu Kaisen. Now you can see that this monster is very strong.
![shibuya!?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d83d9de4e899c78bac99f36fe68dd6dd418821.jpeg)

## The resource pack adds: ## 
1. Custom model warden
(animation of wheel rotation during impact is present)
2. Sound(adaptation) when hitting warden (triggers randomly)

## Requirements: ##
Optifine or any other mod that supports CEM models 1.20.4+
